mapper.select: SELECT * FROM alarm_rule WHERE model_id = #{modelId} AND project_id = #{projectId}
SELECT * FROM alarm_rule WHERE device_code = #{deviceCode} AND project_id = #{projectId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO alarm_rule (rule_name, model_id, device_code, project_id, point_name, alarm_type, alarm_condition, threshold_value, alarm_value, alarm_level, is_active, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{ruleName}, #{modelId}, #{deviceCode}, #{projectId}, #{pointName}, #{alarmType}, #{alarmCondition}, #{thresholdValue},#{alarmValue}, #{alarmLevel}, #{isActive}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE alarm_rule SET rule_name = #{ruleName}, model_id = #{modelId}, device_code = #{deviceCode}, project_id = #{projectId}, point_name = #{pointName}, alarm_type = #{alarmType}, alarm_condition = #{alarmCondition}, threshold_value = #{thresholdValue}, alarm_value = #{alarmValue}, alarm_level = #{alarmLevel}, is_active = #{isActive}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE alarm_rule SET is_active = #{isActive}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
